productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Check White And Khaki Shorts
description: Style Note This pair of shorts from indigo nation is that perfect contour-friendly pair you have been looking for. Designed for off-duty wear and crafted from quality cotton fabric, this piece makes for a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Wear it on a casual day out or when roughing it out in the great outdoors. Team it with funky T-shirts and casual shoes. Product Details Blue, white and khaki check shorts with a looped waist with a button and zipper closures, two side pockets, and two buttoned flap pockets on the thighs and two back pockets with buttoned flaps Material and Care 100% Cotton Hand/machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Drip dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
